business_story: As a CAA case officer I want to receive an Operational Authorisation pack so that I can open and manage a valid case.
action: receive and ingest Operational Authorisation pack
benefit: valid case initiation and tracking
notes: Foundation feature; depends on completeness validation before case opening

business_story: As a CAA case officer I want automated validation of pack completeness so that I can identify missing artefacts before case initiation.
action: validate application pack against completeness checklist
benefit: prevent invalid case openings; reduce rework
notes: Sub-feature of F01; likely integrates with F16 phased gates for progressive validation

business_story: As a CAA SORA assessor I want swarm-aware SORA evidence and guidance so that I can set SAIL and OSO requirements defensibly for multi-agent operations.
action: assess SORA requirements with swarm-specific context
benefit: defensible, swarm-appropriate SAIL/OSO determinations
notes: Large multi-component epic; depends on ConOps clarity and swarm behaviour evidence; overlaps with F08 (swarm decision-making)

business_story: As a CAA safety-case reviewer I want a clear Concept of Operations and Operational Design Domain so that I can judge nominal and worst-credible swarm behaviour.
action: review and validate ConOps and ODD documentation
benefit: assured understanding of nominal and failure modes
notes: Critical input to SORA, DAA, and swarm behaviour assessment; implies structured ConOps parsing if digital

business_story: As a CAA airspace regulator I want a TDA and formal consultation package so that I can segregate the trial from other airspace users.
action: coordinate TDA approval and stakeholder consultation
benefit: segregated, conflict-free trial airspace
notes: Depends on clear ConOps; implies consultation artefact generation and CAP 1616 compliance (which is absent as REQ017)

business_story: As a CAA airspace regulator I want automatic geofence enforcement so that a fly-away cannot escape into uncontrolled BVLOS.
action: enforce geofence containment in swarm flight system
benefit: guaranteed containment; uncontrolled escape prevention
notes: System behaviour feature (not just documentation review); dual concern: evidence of enforcement + TDA integration

business_story: As a CAA spectrum specialist I want authorised monitored C2 and inter-vehicle links so that link loss is survivable and non-interfering.
action: review and assure C2 link robustness and spectrum compliance
benefit: survivable link loss; non-interfering spectrum use
notes: Overlaps with F11 (contingency/flight termination); implies monitoring evidence, link-loss procedure review

business_story: As a CAA DAA assessor I want DO-365 / F3442-aligned evidence for each aircraft and coordinated swarm de-confliction so that cooperative and non-cooperative encounters are resolved predictably.
action: assure DAA performance per DO-365 and coordinated swarm de-confliction
benefit: predictable encounter resolution; assured separation standards
notes: Swarm-specific; implies per-aircraft DAA evidence + swarm de-confliction logic evidence

business_story: As a CAA autonomy reviewer I want the swarm decision-making architecture, airborne limits, and emergent-behaviour evidence so that I can assure collective behaviour.
action: review and assure swarm decision-making architecture and emergent behaviour
benefit: assured understanding of swarm collective behaviour
notes: Overlaps with F03 (SORA swarm context); implies architecture documentation + emergent behaviour test evidence

business_story: As a CAA AI/ML assurance specialist I want an AMLAS / SACE case with a frozen-model manifest and explainability evidence so that ML components are assurable and forensically explainable.
action: review AMLAS case, frozen model manifest, and explainability evidence
benefit: assurable, explainable ML; forensic auditability
notes: Implies model versioning, frozen-manifest storage, explainability artefact parsing; distinct from F09 (swarm decision architecture)

business_story: As a CAA human factors inspector I want workload, duty, and take-over evidence so that I can demonstrate meaningful human control is maintained throughout operations.
action: review human workload and take-over capability evidence
benefit: assured meaningful human control
notes: Overlaps with F14 (crew training/competency); implies workload model evidence, take-over procedure documentation

business_story: As a CAA flight-ops inspector I want independent termination capability, a contingency matrix, and ATSU coordination evidence so that the trial can be made safe in any off-nominal state.
action: assure independent flight termination, contingency procedures, and ATC coordination
benefit: safe termination in any failure mode; off-nominal safety assurance
notes: Overlaps with F07 (C2 link); implies contingency matrix review, ATSU procedure review, termination system evidence

business_story: As a CAA flight safety investigator I want complete recorded evidence, accepted MOR obligations, and a DPIA so that any incident is investigable and privacy is protected.
action: manage incident data recording, MOR submissions, and privacy impact assessment
benefit: forensic incident investigation capability; GDPR/MOR compliance
notes: Implies data retention policy, MOR trigger logic, DPIA template; overlaps with F20 (post-trial archive)

business_story: As a CAA authorisation officer I want insurance documentation so that third-party risk is transferable.
action: ingest and review insurance policy documentation
benefit: assured third-party risk transfer
notes: Sub-feature of REQ013; distinct from F15 (ground survey); implies policy upload, coverage validation

business_story: As a CAA authorisation officer I want a ground environment survey so that third-party risk is factually grounded.
action: ingest and validate ground survey documentation and geospatial data
benefit: factual, geospatial risk assessment
notes: Sub-feature of REQ013; distinct from F14 (insurance); implies spatial data parsing, overlay capability

business_story: As a CAA licensing inspector I want evidenced crew competency so that the trial is flown by qualified crew.
action: review and validate crew training and competency credentials
benefit: assured crew qualification
notes: Overlaps with F11 (human oversight); implies credential validation, training record parsing

business_story: As a CAA/MAA liaison I want a signed regulatory apportionment so that regulatory ownership is gap-free.
action: capture and manage signed CAA/MAA apportionment agreement
benefit: gap-free regulatory ownership; clear responsibility allocation
notes: Implies digital signature capture, role-based access; related to hidden feature (duty holder signature audit)

feature_name: Phased Trial Gates & Progressive Evidence Build
business_story: As a CAA programme manager I want phased gates so that evidence builds progressively and gate decisions are reversible.
action: manage phased trial progression with gated approval and reversible decisions
benefit: progressive, manageable evidence build; reversible decision points
notes: Integrates with F02 (completeness check); implies gate definition, approval workflow, rollback capability

business_story: As a CAA community liaison I want to manage public consultation, media handling, and landowner notification so that CAP 1616 obligations are met and stakeholder concerns are recorded.
action: manage stakeholder consultation, media engagement, and prior notification
benefit: CAP 1616 compliance; documented stakeholder engagement
notes: ABSENT user story (REQ017 notes only); implied by CAP 1616 and GDPR; high-risk missing feature

business_story: As a CAA security officer I want to manage classified MOD evidence so that it is presented securely to the CAA under CAP 722H / JSP 440 without compromise to either side.
action: manage compartmentalized classified evidence handling and disclosure
benefit: secure classification handling; regulatory assurance without security breach
notes: ABSENT user story (REQ018 notes only); implies classification tagging, access control, redaction capability; hidden feature

business_story: As a CAA environmental assessor I want documented environmental impact evidence so that noise, species disturbance, and battery-fire risk are assessed.
action: review environmental impact documentation (noise, species, fire risk)
benefit: documented environmental compliance
notes: ABSENT user story (REQ019 notes only); high-risk missing feature; implies noise model, species impact evidence, fire-risk analysis

business_story: As a CAA programme manager I want post-trial lessons-learned capture and archival so that evidence is preserved and authorisation close-out is documented.
action: capture post-trial outcomes, preserve evidence, and formally close authorization
benefit: institutional learning; audit trail preservation; regulatory closure
notes: ABSENT user story (REQ020 notes only); overlaps with F13 (incident data); implies archive management, close-out checklist

business_story: As a CAA case officer I want regulatory clauses to be version-pinned to the trial authorization so that clause interpretation disputes are avoided.
action: pin regulatory clause library versions to case record
benefit: reproducible, dispute-free clause interpretation
notes: HIDDEN feature not explicitly requested; implied by need for repeatable regulatory interpretation; supports audit trail

business_story: As a CAA security officer I want evidence to be automatically tagged and segregated by classification level so that access control and disclosure are enforced.
action: tag and segregate evidence by classification; enforce access control
benefit: automatic classification-aware access control; reduced human error
notes: HIDDEN sub-feature; non-obvious system behaviour supporting F20; implies metadata tagging, role-based view filtering

feature_name: Operator-Private Feedback vs Regulator Decision Record
business_story: As an applicant I want my feedback and revision history to remain private so that regulator decision records are separated from internal deliberations.
action: segregate operator feedback from regulator decision record
benefit: privacy of applicant deliberations; clean regulator decision audit trail
notes: HIDDEN feature; not explicitly requested; critical for two-mode system (operator prep vs regulator decision); implies dual-channel record management

business_story: As a CAA panel member I want to log overrides and decisions so that all decision points are audited and reversals are traceable.
action: log panel approvals, overrides, and reversals with audit trail
benefit: full audit trail of decision reversals; accountability
notes: HIDDEN feature; implied by F18 (reversible decisions); not explicit in REQs

business_story: As a CAA case officer I want evidence linked to specific regulatory clauses so that compliance is auditable and disputes are traceable.
action: bind evidence artefacts to specific regulatory clauses
benefit: traceable clause compliance; defensible decision records
notes: HIDDEN feature; non-obvious cross-cutting concern; supports regulatory defensibility

business_story: As a CAA case officer I want to view case history and track revisions so that evolution of the case is auditable and rollback is possible.
action: maintain case version history and support revision review/rollback
benefit: full case audit trail; reversibility
notes: HIDDEN feature; implied by reversible gates (F18) and phased build-up; not explicit

business_story: As a CAA programme manager I want to withdraw authorization or re-open a closed trial so that phased gates remain reversible throughout.
action: withdraw active authorization or re-open closed trial
benefit: reversible trial progression; flexibility in phased build-up
notes: HIDDEN feature; implied by REQ016 'reversible' language; not explicit CRUD operation

business_story: As a CAA auditor I want all system actions logged so that system behaviour is forensically reviewable.
action: log all system actions with timestamp, actor, and change
benefit: forensic auditability; compliance with regulatory expectations
notes: HIDDEN feature; non-functional cross-cutting concern; implied by incident investigation (F13) and decision logging (F26)
